Name: Oberon Reavers
Description: The Oberon Reavers are a feared pirate band within a feared region of space, with rumored cannibalistic tendencies. Frontier captains warn it is better to not be taken alive when Reaver ships are spotted.
ReputationStatements: Take the contract, get paid, then get lost.
You mercs love acting superior to us. Right up until you need money or backup.
We do not need soldiers. We need wolves.
The border worlds are weak. Isolated. Careless. A terrible combination.
Raid fast, get the metal and vanish. That’s how you stay alive out here.
You fight like a Reaver already. Easy to forget you’re not one of us.
You've got guts. Real stone-cold killer. Hell, maybe I should be joining your crew.
MissionSuccessStatements: You hit hard and disappeared before they knew what happened. Perfect Reaver work.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: We'll recover. Reavers are good at surviving disappointment.
BadFaithFailureStatements: Next time we need hired guns, we'll look for some with a spine.
